case_title: SARAH MERIDA VS. MAKENA BOROVINA ET AL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-16-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-16-2016 BY JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY (2) DEFENDANTS. DEFENDANT JENN WISE WAIVES SERVICE OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERKS: L. FONG AND S. RAVINANTAPRICHA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-16-2016 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MERIDA, SARAH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BOROVINA, MAKENA WISE, JENN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
